content.p: The Secretary shall use the capabilities of the Department to identify strategic opportunities for collaborative research, development, demonstration, and commercial application of innovative science and technologies.

subsection.heading: Existing programs; coordination of activities
subsection.chapeau: To the maximum extent practicable, the Secretary shall seek—

paragraph.content: to leverage existing programs of the Department; and
to consolidate and coordinate activities throughout the Department to promote collaboration and crosscutting approaches within programs of the Department.
prioritize activities that use all affordable domestic resources;

paragraph.chapeau: develop a planning, evaluation, and technical assessment framework for setting objective long-term strategic goals and evaluating progress that—

subparagraph.content: provides the flexibility to adapt to market dynamics;

paragraph.content: ensure that activities shall be undertaken in a manner that does not duplicate other activities within the Department or other Federal Government activities; and
identify programs that may be more effectively left to the States, industry, nongovernmental organizations, institutions of higher education, or other stakeholders.
